measurements.name: mean_soc_supports
measurements.description: Battery SOC integration supports for mean-SOC calculations (cumulative %-seconds and operated seconds).

measurements.name: battery_cycle_count_support
measurements.description: Aggregated battery cycle-count supports (total charged/discharged energy and max capacity).

measurements.name: battery-warning
measurements.description: CPS BSMU warning state transitions per inverter, manufacturer, and warning type.

measurements.name: battery-fault
measurements.description: CPS BSMU fault state transitions per inverter, manufacturer, and fault type.

measurements.name: demand
measurements.description: Aggregated meter demand (W) by channel tag (site, metered, pv, dc_pv, ess, gen).

measurements.name: inverter-service
measurements.description: Virtual load source demand (W) derived from inverter-service AC power output.

measurements.name: meter-catcher
measurements.description: Virtual load source demand (W) imported from MeterCatcher API, tagged by channel.

measurements.name: timeseries-api
measurements.description: Virtual load source demand (W) imported from ETB TimeSeries API, tagged by channel.

measurements.name: conditions
measurements.description: Hourly weather conditions (temperature, irradiance, wind, precipitation, etc.) from Weatherbit.

measurements.name: forecasts
measurements.description: Weather forecast time series from Weatherbit, tagged by forecast generation time.

measurements.name: latest_forecast
measurements.description: Latest weather forecast snapshot (dropped and rewritten each cycle).

measurements.name: forecasts_logs
measurements.description: Log of forecast generation timestamps written by weather-service.

measurements.name: battman/soc_schedule
measurements.description: Battman SOC schedule values, tagged by forecast issue time.

measurements.name: battman/dispatch_schedule
measurements.description: Battman dispatch schedule values, tagged by forecast issue time.

measurements.name: battman/{property}
measurements.description: Battman strategy state: setpoints, thresholds, mode, strategy name, PID terms, DR signals, pricing.

measurements.name: inverter/{property}
measurements.description: Aggregated inverter data: AC power, state, capacity, SOH, power limits, connection config.

measurements.name: inverter/{id}/{property}
measurements.description: Per-device inverter data: power, state, SOH, nameplate ratings, per-register values.

measurements.name: inverter/write/{id}/{register}
measurements.description: Inverter register write-through notifications per device.

measurements.name: battery/{property}
measurements.description: Aggregated battery data: SOC, SOH, voltage, temperature, capacity, charge/discharge limits.

measurements.name: battery/{id}/{property}
measurements.description: Per-device battery data: SOC, SOH, voltage, cell temps, capacity.

measurements.name: meter/{property}
measurements.description: Aggregated meter data: demand, energy, generation, consumption, pricing, ToU, stats.

measurements.name: meter/{tag}/{property}
measurements.description: Per-meter device demand, cumulative energy, and register values.

measurements.name: modbus/device/{id}/{register}
measurements.description: Raw modbus register values polled by modbus-gateway per device (90d retention).

measurements.name: modbus/complete
measurements.description: Modbus polling cycle completion signal with timestamp.

measurements.name: modbus/processing_frame
measurements.description: Modbus processing frame timing metadata.

measurements.name: oracle/{property}
measurements.description: Oracle forecast outputs: site/metered demand forecasts, model config, retrain status.

measurements.name: weather/forecasts
measurements.description: Weather forecast data republished to MQTT by weather-service.

measurements.name: weather/conditions
measurements.description: Current weather conditions republished to MQTT by weather-service.

measurements.name: time/{property}
measurements.description: Time-service version, time source, and billing schedule.

measurements.name: alert/{service}
measurements.description: Alert events published by any service via the Alert class.

measurements.name: watchdog/start
measurements.description: Watchdog service start signal.

measurements.name: simulation-v2/{property}
measurements.description: Simulation lifecycle signals: version, start, complete.
